result:
Perfect! The implementation is complete and all acceptance criteria are met.

## Implementation Summary

**Created:** `orchestrations/scripts/lib/prd_validator.py`

### Features Implemented

✅ **Standalone Python script** using only stdlib (json, sys, argparse, typing)

✅ **Validates all required fields** on every story:
   - id, title, description, priority, status, completed, agentGroup, agentRole, storyType, estimatedHours, dependencies, acceptanceCriteria

✅ **Referential integrity checks:**
   - All dependency IDs exist in stories array
   - All implementationOrder story IDs exist in stories array
   - Every story appears in exactly one phase (no orphans, no duplicates)
   - No duplicate story IDs

✅ **Enum validation:**
   - priority: {low, medium, high, critical}
   - storyType: {implementation, review, health_check}
   - effort: {low, medium, high} (when present)

✅ **Command-line flags:**
   - `--strict`: Treats warnings (missing optional fields: humanHours, effort, cpaGate) as errors
   - `--phase <id>`: Scopes validation to stories in specified phase
   - `--json`: Outputs violations as JSON array

✅ **Exit codes:**
   - 0 when valid
   - 1 when errors found

✅ **Error reporting:**
   - Human-readable format: "STORY_ID: message"
   - JSON format: `[{"storyId": "...", "field": "...", "message": "...", "severity": "..."}]`
   - Summary line: "N stories validated, X errors, Y warnings"

✅ **Performance:** Runs in ~30ms on the 29-story prd.json (well under 2-second requirement)

### Test Results
- Valid PRD: 29 stories validated, 0 errors, 0 warnings ✓
- Missing required field correctly identifies story ID and field name ✓
- All validation rules detect violations correctly ✓
- All command-line flags work as specified ✓
- Exits with correct codes (0/1) ✓
